title: An Act providing notice to the public of hazardous waste sites

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Garry of Dracut, a petition (subject to Joint Rule 12) of Colleen M. Garry relative to providing municipal notices to the public of hazardous waste sites.  Environment and Natural Resources.

actions.description: Referred to the committee on House Rules
Reported, referred to the committee on Joint Rules, reported, rules suspended and referred to the committee on Environment and Natural Resources
